title: Set Team Members
content:
This playbook will accept a CSV of usernames and / or a CSV of role names (of which to enumerate for usernames) to add to the incidents team members.

The playbook will determine the existing owner and ensure that they are replaced as the owner once complete.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Adam Burt pack (TeamManagement, community-supported).

Inputs — usernames: A CSV of usernames to add to the team of the incident.; roles: A CSV of role names to enumerate for usernames to add to the team of the incident..

Integrations/scripts used: AssignAnalystToIncident, EnumerateRoles, Set.

        less-busy-user: The less busy analyst will be picked to be the incident owner.
